THE COLLECTIONS

Curated For You

Three distinct lines. Each tells a story of heritage, innovation, and uncompromising quality.

Signature

The Aurelio

Our flagship collection. Bold architectural frames in heritage acetate. The choice of visionaries.

Discover →
Limited

The Vittorio

Understated elegance. Slim profiles for the modern connoisseur.

Discover →
Sport

The Marco

Performance luxury. Titanium construction meets optical excellence.

Discover →

CRAFTSMANSHIP

Artistry in Every Detail

Each pair of Luxe Vision sunglasses begins its journey in a small atelier outside Milan. Master craftsmen with decades of experience shape, polish, and perfect every frame.

◆

Italian Mazzucchelli Acetate

Sourced from the world's finest cellulose acetate producer

◆

Zeiss Optical Lenses

Precision optics with 100% UV protection

◆

180-Degree Hinge

Custom-engineered for durability and comfort

◆

Hand-Polished Finish

24 hours of polishing for the signature lustre

Craftsmanship Visual
"Luxe Vision doesn't just protect your eyes—they frame your perspective on the world. The attention to detail is extraordinary."
Alessandro RossiCreative Director, Milan

THE BOUTIQUE

Experience Luxe Vision

Visit our Milan atelier for a private fitting, or arrange a consultation with our eyewear specialists.

Private Fitting

One-hour consultation with our master optician. Personalized recommendations based on your features and style.

Schedule →

Virtual Concierge

Can't visit Milan? Our virtual fitting service uses advanced face mapping to recommend your perfect frame.

Start Virtual →

Concierge Service

White-glove delivery worldwide. Complimentary adjustments and lifetime maintenance.

Inquire →

Join the Inner Circle

Be the first to know about limited releases, exclusive events, and artisan stories.
